priorAuditDiscrepancy: Prior `diag:station-economics` cleared all `isPlayer` flags and averaged the full commercial book (median SF 1980 margin ~−105%). verdict.verdictLabel: Further targeted audit needed (live flagship not reproduced; validate with human-play snapshot export)
signals: SF 1980 FM AC player flagship NOT reproduced: 0 hits with rev≥$1.5M and margin≥40% in 40 benchmark-bot player runs
